title: Identify points, lines, line segments, rays, and angles
description: Recognize points, lines, line segments, rays, and angles in geometric figures.
topic_path: Identify points, lines, line segments, rays, and angles

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is a point?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: A *point* is an exact location. It has no size, only position.
Which image shows an exact location or position?
[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A straight mark with dots on each end.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cbbcab5b59a2e45aa342f7cb13c90e4d54f1dbda)
![A straight mark with arrows on each end pointing outward in opposite directions.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a0f69c4a4e900d0d459cfa820bb05e0028ab7f6d)

![A dot labeled D with two arrows extending from it, one arrow going slightly upward and the other going slightly downward. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7ae9829dbf5aa6d6bdbba8bbfad226b33c221c7b)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is a point?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: A *point* is an exact location. It has no size, only position.
Which image shows an exact location or position?
None of the figures show an exact location or position.

choices.content: ![A straight mark with dots on each end.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cbbcab5b59a2e45aa342f7cb13c90e4d54f1dbda)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is a ray?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: A *ray* is perfectly straight, starts at one point and goes on forever in one direction.
Which image shows a line that is perfectly straight, starts at one point and goes on forever in one direction?
[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A straight mark with dots on each end.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cbbcab5b59a2e45aa342f7cb13c90e4d54f1dbda)
![A straight mark with arrows on each end pointing outward in opposite directions.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a0f69c4a4e900d0d459cfa820bb05e0028ab7f6d)
![A dot labeled B with an arrow extending from it and passing through another dot, labeled A.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3a46682b88477b4a802e2b494f210785f55a7b28)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is a ray?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: A *ray* is perfectly straight, starts at one point and goes on forever in one direction.
Which image shows a line that is perfectly straight, starts at one point and goes on forever in one direction?
None of the figures show a line that is perfectly straight, starts at one point and goes on forever in one direction.

choices.content: ![A straight mark with dots on each end.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cbbcab5b59a2e45aa342f7cb13c90e4d54f1dbda)

The other long straight mark extends down and to the left and passes through a dot. Three blue arcs connect these two long straight marks.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/54b8cc94c80a8576bdb70b1bbb23347b3fc5d082)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is a line segment?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: A *line segment* is perfectly straight, starts at one point and ends at another point.
Which image shows a line that is perfectly straight, starts at one point and ends at another point?
[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A straight mark with arrows on each end pointing outward in opposite directions.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7025b2a8952c1272b5dfe17300029b27f7f30c71)

![A dot labeled B with two arrows extending from it, one arrow going slightly upward and the other going slightly downward.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fd25ae95edef67625c6b012e1b5c398f77a3bf68)
![A straight mark with dots on each end. One dot is labeled A and the other dot is labeled B.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/acdf1aaa968fc7f798e295d9c807c43ea82e196c)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is a line segment?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: A *line segment* is perfectly straight, starts at one point and ends at another point.
Which image shows a line that is perfectly straight, starts at one point and ends at another point?
None of the figures show a line that is perfectly straight, starts at one point and ends at another point.

choices.content: ![A straight mark with arrows on each end pointing outward in opposite directions.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7025b2a8952c1272b5dfe17300029b27f7f30c71)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is an angle?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: An *angle* is the figure formed by two rays meeting at a common end point.
Which image shows a figure formed by two rays meeting at a common end point?
[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A straight mark with arrows on each end pointing outward in opposite directions.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a0f69c4a4e900d0d459cfa820bb05e0028ab7f6d)

![Two long straight marks with arrows on each end pointing outward in opposite directions intersect at a dot labeled B. One long straight mark extends down and slightly to the right from dot labeled B and passes through a dot labeled C. The other long straight mark extends left and slightly down from dot labeled B and passes through a dot labeled A.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d86dad1f7c342c2eb7445fc938893281515e4d9b)
![A straight mark with dots on each end. One dot is labeled A and the other dot is labeled B.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/30ef9e6d2e51a6aea40c1c177667054cf99893b0)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which term describes this figure?**

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Term | Definition
- | - | -
Angle | An *angle* is the figure formed by two rays meeting at a common end point.
Line  | A *line* is perfectly straight and extends forever in both directions.
Line segment | A *line segment* is perfectly straight, starts at one point and ends at another point.
Point| A *point* is an exact location. It has no size, only position.
Ray | A *ray* is perfectly straight, starts at one point and goes on forever in one direction
Which definition describes the figure?
None of the definitions describe the figure.

options.alt: A flat shape has four sides and four corners. Its opposite sides are equal in length and extend in the same direction.

assessment_items.question_content:

Point| A *point* is an exact location. It has no size, only position.
Ray | A *ray* is perfectly straight, starts at one point and goes on forever in one direction
Which definition describes the figure?
None of the definitions describe the figure.

options.alt: A long mark extends in the downward left direction, then curves and extends in the upward right direction, then curves again and extends in the downward left direction. The arrow on its left end points along its direction.

hints:

- | - | -

None of the definitions describe the figure.

options.alt: A long curved mark falls to the right and then rises to the right.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which term describes this figure?**

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Term | Definition
- | - | -
Angle | An *angle* is the figure formed by two rays meeting at a common end point.
Line  | A *line* is perfectly straight and extends forever in both directions.
Line segment | A *line segment* is perfectly straight, starts at one point and ends at another point.
Point| A *point* is an exact location. It has no size, only position.
Ray | A *ray* is perfectly straight, starts at one point and goes on forever in one direction
Which definition describes the figure?
The figure is an exact location. It has no size, only position.
The figure is a *point*.

The figure is perfectly straight, starts at one point and goes on forever in one direction.
The figure is a *ray*.
